name: How is fault determined in occupational hearing loss cases?

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in occupational hearing loss cases?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Fault irrelevant in workers' comp; no-fault system covers if arising out of employment.** Prove substantial job causation via noise levels, duration, protection adequacy.[2][4] Strict liability on employer for unsafe noise. Third-party suits possible for defective equipment.[5] Medical opinions decisive.[1]
